Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: ADENOCARCINOMA, NOT OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 
ICD10 Code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla 
Differentiation:  Moderately differentiated | Staging:    
Integrated TNM Stage:      
Dukes:

TWR / DTT

Colonoscopy : At 13cm from insertion there was a malignant looking mass with an abnormal pit pattern suspicious features for malignancy. 

Discuss imaging, staging and path

DTT

CT 29/02/2025: Mid rectal caner with associated mesorectal lymph nodes. Multiple nodules within the lungs suspicious for lung metastases. Indeterminate retroperitoneal lymph nodes. 
Colonoscopy noted - Histo: Adenocarcinoma. MMR deficient 

Outcome: MRI Rectum, PET CT. Rediscuss at MDT for formal staging. Patient aware, decision RE treatment following further imaging and discussion.
